faqs.question: What are the most common pantry pests in North Castle homes?
faqs.answer: North Castle residents most frequently encounter Indian meal moths, flour beetles, grain weevils, and cigarette beetles. These pests infest dry goods like cereals, flour, pasta, nuts, and dried fruits, often arriving in contaminated products from the store or farmers markets.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to pantry pest problems in North Castle?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service to North Castle and surrounding Westchester areas. Our team understands the urgency of pantry pest issues and works to schedule appointments at your earliest convenience, with flexible timing to fit your schedule.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 pantry pest treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection of your pantry and kitchen areas, identification of infested items, targeted treatment using safe EPA-approved products, detailed cleanup recommendations, and preventive guidance. Pricing depends on the severity of infestation and the size of the affected area.

faqs.question: How can I prevent pantry pests from returning after treatment?
faqs.answer: Store dry goods in airtight containers, regularly inspect new groceries before storing, clean pantry shelves frequently, rotate older items to the front, and maintain proper ventilation in storage areas. We provide detailed prevention tips specific to your North Castle home during our service visit.
